vehicle.name: Vehicle Insurance
steps: Ensure safety and check for injuries.
Take photographs of damage and accident scene.
Exchange contact and insurance info with other parties.
Submit the claim through the mobile app or website.

health.name: Health Insurance
steps: Seek medical attention at a network hospital if possible.
Inform the TPA or insurance company.
Provide the health card at the hospital admission desk.
Keep all medical bills, reports, and prescriptions safe.
File for reimbursement or opt for cashless facility.
Submit discharge summary and final hospital bill.

life.name: Life Insurance
steps: Notify the insurance provider about the demise of the insured.
Ensure you have the original policy document.
Collect necessary legal and medical certificates.
Fill out the claim application form.
Submit the documents to the nearest insurance branch.

status_descriptions: Your claim is currently Under Review.
Your claim is Pending additional information.

common_responses.greeting: Hello! I'm InsureAssist AI. How can I help you today?
common_responses.not_found: Please specify Vehicle, Health, or Life insurance.
common_responses.help: You can ask about claims, documents, or status.
